title: ENERGY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SELF ENHANCEMENT INC COMMUNITY & FAMILY PROGRAMS ENERGY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial assistance with electric and gas bills. Assistance is dependent on funding availability. 310 NE Failing Street Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Low income households Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 249-1721 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 249-1721 Hotline (503) 713-5590 Energy Assistance Appointments Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call to check for appointments. No walk-in appointments. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, proof of address, and current utility bill. Other documents may be requested. AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - SHORT TERM RENTAL ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD WELFARE ADVOCACY MUTUAL SUPPORT - ANTI DOMESTIC AND SEXUAL VIOLENCE PROGRAM UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
